scripts.deps:check: depcruise --config dependency-cruiser.config.cjs app components src db
scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run lint && pnpm run deps:check && pnpm run test
scripts.db:reset:dev: MINISHOP_ALLOW_DB_RESET=1 tsx scripts/reset-dev-db.ts && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed:dev
scripts.benchmark:compose:up: docker compose -p minishop-benchmark -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.benchmark.yml up -d --build benchmark-postgres benchmark-app
scripts.benchmark:compose:down: docker compose -p minishop-benchmark -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.benchmark.yml down -v --remove-orphans
scripts.benchmark:compose:baseline: docker compose -p minishop-benchmark -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.benchmark.yml run --build --rm benchmark-runner pnpm benchmark:checkout:postgres:reset
scripts.benchmark:compose:cart: docker compose -p minishop-benchmark -f docker-compose.yml -f docker-compose.benchmark.yml run --build --rm benchmark-runner pnpm benchmark:checkout:postgres:cart:reset
